name: vtsSetStimulationMode
title: vtsSetStimulationMode
description: Sets the mode for internal voltage or resistance stimulation.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.

description: The following example demonstrates how to use the PWM output of a VT2004 channel to simulate a PWM based sensor (e.g. a RPM sensor). The channel used in this example is called RPM_Sensor.
